bead.title: try.Attempt: relocate no_changes adjudication and labels
bead.description:
PROBLEM
The no_changes contract is still adjudicated in execute_bead_loop.go after Attempt returns, so the loop owns triage labels, no_changes_count bookkeeping, and already_satisfied closure policy instead of try.Attempt. That makes the attempt contract leaky and keeps no_changes policy split across packages.

ROOT CAUSE
- cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go:975-1059 calls w.adjudicateNoChangesContract, increments the no_changes counter, applies triage labels, emits no_changes_* events, and closes the bead when the contract is satisfied.
- cli/internal/agent/try/attempt.go:99-137 only returns OutcomeReported / OutcomeSuccess / OutcomePark for conflict recovery; it does not own the no_changes policy.

PROPOSED FIX
- Move ParseNoChangesRationale, verification_command execution, and triage label/event selection into cli/internal/agent/try/attempt.go near Attempt().
- Extend the try outcome contract so the loop only consumes structured disposition data plus cooldown/park reason/event instructions.
- Keep the persisted status canonical: needs_investigation is represented with triage labels/events, not a new status value.
- Reduce execute_bead_loop.go to generic structured-outcome handling for the no_changes path.

NON-SCOPE
- Rate-limit retry handling.
- Decomposition, push_failed, or push_conflict routing.
- Any change to the canonical status vocabulary beyond the existing triage-label contract.

INTERSECTIONS
- Absorbs ddx-b24e9630 behavior.
bead.acceptance:
1. TestAttempt_NoChanges_StaysCanonical_NotNeedsInvestigation verifies the attempt layer does not persist needs_investigation as a status and still emits triage:no-changes-* labels.
2. TestAttempt_NoChanges_WiresAdjudicateNoChangesContract proves try.Attempt calls adjudicateNoChangesContract rather than leaving it only in execute_bead_loop.go.
3. TestExecuteBeadWorkerNoChangesVerifiedClosesImmediately, TestExecuteBeadWorkerNoChangesVerificationFailsKeepsBeadOpen, TestExecuteBeadWorkerNoChangesNeedsInvestigationKeepsBeadOpen, and TestExecuteBeadWorkerNoChangesUnjustifiedStaysOpenWithLabel remain green after the move.
4. cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... green.
5. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
